description: An IAM analyst must immediately deprovision all access for an employee who has been terminated.

nodes.task_description: Receive the termination notification from HR, which triggers the automated deprovisioning workflow.

expected_outcome.value: The workflow is triggered successfully upon receipt of the HR notification.

nodes.task_description: The workflow immediately disables the user's Active Directory account, preventing all logins.

expected_outcome.value: The user's primary account is disabled within seconds.

nodes.task_description: The workflow revokes the user's access to all cloud applications (e.g., Salesforce, Slack) via the SSO provider.

expected_outcome.value: The user's access to all connected applications is successfully revoked.
